title: TBS: muted SMP sounds
description: Mutes the 1.10 TBS version the SMP uses. I don't like it.
body:
# Mutes 1.10 TBS sounds. The SMP is a fucking cachophony.

_ONLY WORKS WITH 1.10 AND ABOVE. I HAVE NOT TESTED 1.9.9 AND IT I DO NOT NEED TO_

## Why only 1.10 and above?
They changed the names of files and it is way too case specific to be applicable to 1.9.7.
On another note, you can't mute it through friendly creature sounds. Another legacy W.
